summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of OpenClaw Mission Control - Desktop Apps Connectors on Cowork page, Chat PlusMenu reverted to service-only connectors, Space Banner/Chip/Sidebar tinting features. All 19 requested features tested and verified working.
passed_tests: Cowork page: 'Connectors & Desktop Apps' panel shows when clicking toggle button (data-testid='cowork-connectors-toggle')
Cowork page: Services section shows 12 connectors in 2-column grid with working toggles
Cowork page: Desktop Apps section shows 4 groups (Adobe, Microsoft, Google, Other Apps)
Cowork page: Clicking Adobe group expands to show 8 individual app toggles (Photoshop, Illustrator, InDesign, Premiere Pro, After Effects, XD, Lightroom, Acrobat)
Cowork page: Clicking Microsoft group expands to show 7 apps (Word, Excel, PowerPoint, Outlook, Teams, OneNote, VS Code)
Cowork page: Clicking Google group expands to show 7 apps (Docs, Sheets, Slides, Drive, Calendar, Chrome, Meet)
Cowork page: Clicking Other Apps group expands to show 5 apps (Spotify, Discord, Zoom, Terminal, Finder)
Cowork page: 'Add app' link visible and navigates to /customize?tab=connectors
Cowork page: 'Manage connectors' link visible and navigates to /settings?tab=apps
Cowork page: 'Plugins' link visible and navigates to /customize?tab=plugins

Chat PlusMenu: Connectors submenu shows ONLY service connectors (Control your Mac, Desktop Commander, File Access, Web Search, Signal, Telegram, VS Code, Figma, Slack, Chrome Browser, Docker, Notion) - NO desktop app groups
Chat Space Banner: When thread assigned to Design space, pink banner appears above messages with space icon + 'Design' + 'space' label (data-testid='chat-space-banner')
Chat Space Banner: Banner disappears for threads not linked to a space (new thread)
Sidebar Threads: Space-linked threads have colored left border matching space color (pink for Design)
Sidebar Threads: Space-linked threads show space name badge ('Design') below thread title
Sidebar Threads: Non-space threads have transparent left border (no tint)
InputBar Space Chip: Shows colored space chip 'Design' when active thread has space (data-testid='space-indicator-chip')
InputBar Space Chip: Disappears when switching to thread without space (new thread)
Model Selector: Shows 6 providers (huggingface, ollama, opencode, opencode-go, openrouter, venice) - working correctly
Page Navigation: All 10 pages render correctly (Chat, Dashboard, Jobs, Approvals, Spaces, Settings, Cowork, Customize, Agent, Code)
seed_data_creation: None - using mock data from Zustand store
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features verified working: 1) Cowork page now has 'Connectors & Desktop Apps' panel with Services (12 connectors) + Desktop Apps (4 expandable groups: Adobe/Microsoft/Google/Other with individual app toggles). 2) Chat PlusMenu Connectors submenu reverted to show ONLY service connectors (no desktop app groups). 3) Space assignment fully functional - threads can be assigned to spaces via PlusMenu 'Add to Spaces'. 4) Chat Space Banner shows colored banner with space icon + name + 'space' label when thread linked to space. 5) Sidebar threads show colored left border + space name badge when linked to space. 6) InputBar shows colored space chip when active thread has space. 7) All indicators disappear for threads without spaces. Key data-testids: cowork-connectors-toggle, desktop-group-adobe, desktop-group-microsoft, desktop-group-google, desktop-group-other, plus-menu-trigger, space-assign-space-files, space-assign-space-design, space-assign-space-dev, chat-space-banner, space-indicator-chip, model-selector-trigger, new-thread-btn, chat-input, send-btn.
mocked_apis_note: ALL APIs are MOCKED via Zustand store - no real backend calls. Mocked: sendMessage, switchModel, toggleConnector, assignThreadToSpace, addSpace, all state updates
